_rationale: debug export payload (file_count, symbol_count, build_duration_ms, memory_rss_mb, uptime_seconds, ready, root, …) is volatile because the C++ port queries a live in-process server that may or may not be ready in the spawned subprocess. The parity descriptor is `parse: exit-only` for the same reason — the integration test mirrors that by ignoring every emitted field and asserting exit==0 only. Identical Decision-C divergence as `index/synthetic-multilang`; see `tests/integration/index/KNOWN_DIVERGENCE.md` for the rationale.
